MEHFIL

Hyderabad's Original Biryani Experience
Now powered by AI Dining

“Where every grain of basmati carries the perfume of saffron and the soul of old Hyderabad.”

Explore Menu Order Now
4.8 · 12K+ reviews Times Food Award 2024 Avg. ready in 18 min
Since 2006

A Legacy of taste

From a single kitchen in old Hyderabad to a family of restaurants and now an AI-powered dining house — Mehfil's journey has always begun with one ingredient: love.

2006

The First Mehfil

A single tandoor and one biryani recipe — opened in the by-lanes of old Hyderabad.

2010

Expansion

Three outlets across Hyderabad. The dum biryani earns its first city-wide following.

2015

Signature Recognition

Times Food Awards: Best Hyderabadi Biryani. The Nizami sweets win their own column.

2020

Modern Dining

A new flagship — heritage architecture, modern service, contactless ordering.

2026

AI-Powered Dining

MehfilAI joins the family — recommending pairings, remembering preferences, never sleeping.

Why Hyderabad chose us

A table where memories are cooked

Authentic Hyderabadi

Recipes guarded since the Nizam era — dum cooked, never rushed.

Fresh, Always

Spices stone-ground daily, meats sourced morning-fresh.

Family Friendly

Big tables, big platters, big welcomes — bring the whole crew.

Signature Recipes

Eight signatures, twelve heritage classics, zero shortcuts.

Fast Service

Avg. 18-minute prep on biryani — without compromising the dum.

AI Waiter

Your personal sommelier — chat, ask, order, track. All in one place.

The Concierge

Meet MehfilAI — Waiter

Our AI Waiter is your personal sommelier. She discovers dishes for you, customises meals, places orders and tracks every step — in the warm voice of Hyderabad.

Example Conversation
“I want spicy chicken biryani.”
“Our signature Dum Biryani with Apollo Fish on the side. Finish with Double Ka Meetha?”
From the Royal Kitchen

Signature dishes

See full menu
The Menu

27 dishes. 8 categories. One Hyderabad.

Search, filter by veg/non-veg, dive into biryanis, starters, tandoori, curries, breads, rice, traditional sweets and beverages.

Secure & instant

Pay your way

Every major method — UPI, cards, wallets, cash. Encrypted end-to-end by Stripe.

PhonePe
Google Pay
Paytm
Razorpay
Visa / Master

Always in the loop

We'll ping you

Order Accepted

Confirmed by the counter in seconds.

Preparing

Brisket roasting, biryani layering — chef is on it.

Ready

A gentle chime tells you to walk over.

Delivered

Bon appétit. Tap to rate or reorder.

Via browser push today · SMS & WhatsApp arriving soon

Word of mouth

What Hyderabad whispers

“Twenty years in Hyderabad — Mehfil is still the most authentic dum I've eaten outside my mother's kitchen. The qubani is poetry.”

Asma R.
Banjara Hills · 8 visits

“Booked their family pack for a birthday. AI Waiter remembered we ordered last time and suggested the same combo — uncanny and lovely.”

Rohit M.
Family of 6

“Apollo fish that audibly crackles. Saffron biryani with mirchi salan that argues sweetly with you. Five stars.”

Priya K.
Foodie · IG 80K
